Why Magic Egypt Tours

Ultimate flexibility

You're in control, with free cancellation and payment options to satisfy any plan or budget.

Memorable experiences

Browse and book tours and activities so incredible, you'll want to tell your friends.

Quality at our core

High quality standards. Millions of reviews.

Award-winning support

New price? New plan? No problem. We're here to help, 24/7.

FAQs

Why book with Magic Egypt Tours?

Magic Egypt Tours unlocks the secrets of ancient Egypt, delivering unforgettable journeys that exceed your wildest dreams. Our customer-focused approach is reflected in our outstanding TripAdvisor reviews (averaging 4.9 stars), flexible itineraries that cater to your interests, and competitive prices. We offer unparalleled customer service and seamless payment options for your convenience. But the true magic lies in our breathtaking Nile River cruises, where history and luxury intertwine for an adventure you'll cherish forever.

Is there a special rate for private groups booking with Magic Egypt Tours?

Yes! Magic Egypt Tours offers attractive discounts for large groups booking private trips. We also reward customer loyalty with discounts for repeat travelers, loyalty program members, and students. Let us customize the perfect Egypt travel package and save you money!

How much will I have to pay as a deposit?

To secure your booking, we typically require a deposit of 10-25% of the total tour price. During peak seasons like Christmas and New Year's, the deposit may increase to 50%.

How can I obtain my visa to visit Egypt?

All visitors to Egypt need a passport valid for at least six months from their arrival date. However, if you're a citizen of Australia, Canada, Croatia, the European Union, Georgia, Japan, New Zealand, Norway, Macedonia, South Korea, Russia, Serbia, Ukraine, the United Kingdom, or the USA, you can easily purchase a 1-month entry visa on arrival. Simply visit a bank window before customs for a quick and simple process.

Is Egypt considered a safe destination?

Egypt's reputation as a safe and welcoming tourist destination spans decades. You'll immediately feel at home thanks to the warmth and kindness of the Egyptian people. With sensible precautions, you can confidently explore Egypt's safe cities and enjoy our tours and trips without worry. Tourist areas boast especially low crime rates, ensuring a peaceful and enjoyable experience.

Speak to our expert at +2 01026563967
